Speaker 1: So, I still have boxes here. I still have boxes at Ross’s, and I have nowhere to live! Wow. I could so easily freak out right now.
Pheebs: What about me? I just found out that Denise is leaving town for a while, I don’t have a roommate.
Speaker 1: Well, maybe-maybe I could be your roommate Pheebs.
Pheebs: Maybe you could be my roommate!
Speaker 1: Well there’s an idea!!
Pheebs: Yeah!
Speaker 1: That would be great! Wait, how long is Denise gone for?
Pheebs: Umm, she said she’d be back December 26th.
Speaker 1: December 26th, huh maybe she’s Santa Clause.
